reference: Hi, I want to know why my mother and now a friend have infections in their legs. What can be done? My mother passed away, and my friend hasn't. Does she need more exercise? She is eighty-three, so she is not very young. She goes out a lot, and I see her rubbing her legs a lot. Does that make it worse? It seems like nothing helped my mother or her with those rubs.
text: そのような大きなことをするのはよくないと思います。
